title: cinnamomum sandkuhlii
intro: Cinnamomum sandkuhlii, also known as Sandkuhl's cinnamon or Sandkuh's cinnamon, is a plant species within the Cinnamomum genus, native to Borneo. Traditionally, the plant's inner bark has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum sandkuhlii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the bark is often dried, ground into a powder, and used as a spice or added to tea blends to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
